text:
Created attachment 143626
ansible 1.6.2 -> 1.6.3

Please update sysutils/ansible to 1.6.3.
This is a minor release. Changes:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ansible/ansible/v1.6.3/CHANGELOG.md

This also integrates the fix in local patches, which are removed in this diff.
